title: You're My Everything
writer: Lamar Trotti, Will H. Hays Jr., George Jessel
actors: Dan Dailey, Anne Baxter, Anne Revere
plot: In 1924, stage-struck Boston blueblood Hannah Adams picks up musical star Tim O'Connor and takes him home for dinner. One thing leads to another, and when Tim's show rolls on to Chicago a new Mrs. O'Connor comes along as incompete...
